Watch out for these. It's tricky to see whether the targt is in the SYMB or LINK column!

Transcription advice: Do the PQ+SYMB columns first bcs you can just go down the page, then you add the incdientals, and finally the comments. Also, you can use a formatter for the ID (="M001R"&TEXT(A1,"000"))
